Class RelationshipRepository

java.lang.Object
br.ufal.ic.p2.jackut.repositories.AbstractRepository<Relationship>
br.ufal.ic.p2.jackut.repositories.users.RelationshipRepository
public class RelationshipRepository extends AbstractRepository<Relationship>
Repositório dos relacionamentos dos usuários.
